body_txt: A weapon — usually a Cool Sword — that talks. Some combination of Empathic Weapon , Evil Weapon , and Exposition Fairy may apply. It could be magical ( the weapon may have its own soul ) or technological (substitute soul with AI and voice output). It might get annoying, though. If the weapon won't shut up , the wielder may feel Blessed with Suck . If the weapon can do more than just talk, see Equippable Ally .
